title: Mellow Smoky Venezuelan Tamarind Empanadas
description: A crowd-pleasing Venezuelan dish featuring a tangy tamarind ball, smoky flavor, and a silky texture, all wrapped in a low-fat friendly empanada. This recipe is a must-try for anyone looking for a unique and delicious meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, smoked paprika, and salt.
Add the olive oil, yellow mustard, and tamarind paste to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Gradually add the water to the bowl and mix until the dough comes together.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5 minutes.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Use a rolling pin to flatten each ball into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of tamarind paste in the center of each circle and fold the dough over to form a half-moon shape.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with the beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes.
